hypothesis: GER40 M15 exhibits sustained directional moves during EU cash session. A 20-bar Donchian breakout filtered by ADX>22 and EMA50>EMA200 (longs only; mirrored for shorts) captures trend continuation with positive expectancy.

regime_filter.description: Only trade when ADX14 >= 22 AND within EU cash session; skip chop.

entry_rules.long: close > highest_high(20 prior bars) AND EMA50 > EMA200 AND ADX14 >= 22 AND in EU session
entry_rules.short: close < lowest_low(20 prior bars) AND EMA50 < EMA200 AND ADX14 >= 22 AND in EU session
gates: no entry in final 30 min of session

exit_rules.trailing: Chandelier-style: max(high_since_entry) - 2.5x ATR14 once trade is +1x ATR in profit
exit_rules.time_stop: close after 40 M15 bars (~10h) if neither SL/TP hit
